name: Cisco Threat Grid
description: Cisco Secure Malware Analytics (Threat Grid) provides advanced sandboxing and malware analysis with threat intelligence context, behavioral indicators, and detailed network traffic analysis

actions.name: Submit Sample
actions.description: Submit a file sample for dynamic malware analysis in the Threat Grid sandbox

parameters.name: sample
parameters.description: The file to submit for analysis (multipart form data)

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Custom filename for the submitted sample

parameters.name: vm
parameters.description: VM image to use for analysis (e.g., win10-x64, win7-x64)

parameters.name: private
parameters.description: Mark the sample and results as private (not shared with the community)

parameters.name: playbook
parameters.description: Name of the Threat Grid playbook to execute during analysis

parameters.name: sample_password
parameters.description: Password for encrypted/password-protected samples

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to apply to the sample

parameters.name: vm_runtime
parameters.description: Analysis runtime in minutes (must be 2 or 5)

actions.name: Submit URL
actions.description: Submit a URL for analysis in the Threat Grid sandbox

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to submit for analysis

parameters.name: vm
parameters.description: VM image to use for analysis

parameters.name: private
parameters.description: Mark the URL and results as private

parameters.name: playbook
parameters.description: Playbook name to execute during analysis

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags

parameters.name: vm_runtime
parameters.description: Analysis runtime in minutes (must be 2 or 5)

actions.name: Get Sample Report
actions.description: Retrieve the full analysis report for a completed sample submission

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID (task ID) returned from submission

actions.name: Get Sample Summary
actions.description: Get a summary of the analysis including verdict, threat score, and behavioral indicators

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID returned from submission

actions.name: Get Sample State
actions.description: Check the current processing state of a submitted sample

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to check status for

actions.name: Get Threat Indicators
actions.description: Retrieve behavioral threat indicators and IOCs from a completed analysis

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to get threat indicators for

actions.name: Search Submissions
actions.description: Search for previously submitted samples by hash, filename, tag, or other criteria

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query (hash, filename, domain, IP, or other search term)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

actions.name: Get Network Streams
actions.description: Retrieve captured network traffic streams from the sandbox analysis

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to get network data for

actions.name: List Playbooks
actions.description: List all available analysis playbooks in the Threat Grid environment

actions.name: List VMs
actions.description: List all available VM images for sandbox analysis
